goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 14:30' and should leave on 'friday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '1 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for 'the same group of people' and '3 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from birmingham new street and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 14:30 and should leave on friday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 1 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
